response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on geospatial projects (e.g., GISCollective), but his background lacks direct commercial experience in C++/Rust for routing/tiling systems or large-scale navigation data pipelines. His expertise in distributed systems and performance optimization is relevant, though the role's core technical requirements are not fully met.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial platforms (GISCollective) and open-source contributions, showing passion for mapping/data pipelines.
Proven track record in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby media, DLang micro-services).
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn (e.g., workshops, cross-stack contributions).
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with no explicit C++/Rust experience listed for routing/tiling systems.
Limited commercial experience in navigation/routing data pipelines or real-time traffic integration.
Recent roles focus on full-stack/AI infrastructure, diverging from the role's core backend/data engineering needs.
